data.title: Content Moderation
data.description: Automated systems are used to detect and remove harmful content.
data.technical_spec: AI-driven algorithms scan uploaded videos for violations of community guidelines.

data.title: Authentication Protocols
data.description: Robust authentication mechanisms protect user accounts.
data.technical_spec: Two-factor authentication (2FA) and OAuth protocols secure user access.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: All data in transit and at rest is encrypted to protect user privacy.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS 1.3 for data in transit and AES-256 encryption for data stored at rest.

data.title: DDoS Mitigation
data.description: Techniques are employed to mitigate distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Advanced filters and rate limiting detect and block malicious traffic.

data.title: Bug Bounty Program
data.description: Encourages ethical hackers to find and report security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Rewards are given for discovering significant vulnerabilities in the platform.
